name: project_overview
content: Bean & Brew is a Go web application for a coffee shop. Architecture: Clean Architecture with 4 layers (entityРєњrepositoryРєњusecaseРєњhandler). Tech stack: Go 1.25, chi router, SQLite (in-memory for tests), html/template. The project has 175 test functions (241 runs including subtests) across 4 layers: entity unit tests (28 functions, 66 subtests), repository integration tests (39 functions), usecase tests (51 functions), API handler tests (57 functions). Test naming convention: TestLevel_Entity_Method (e.g. TestUnitProductValidate, TestIntegrationProductCRUD, TestAPIOrderFlow). All tests use fresh in-memory SQLite databases via setupTestDB(t) or setupTestServer(t) helpers Рђћ no shared state between tests.

name: entity_product
content: Product entity: struct with fields ID(int64), CategoryID(int64), Name(string), Description(string), Price(float64), ImageURL(string), InStock(bool), CreatedAt(time.Time), UpdatedAt(time.Time). Methods: Validate() checks Name!="" Рєњ ErrEmptyName, Price>=0 Рєњ ErrNegativePrice, CategoryID>0 Рєњ ErrInvalidCategory (in this priority order). ApplyDiscount(percent float64) returns discounted price; returns original if percent<0 or >100. Tests: TestUnitProductValidate (14 subtests: valid, empty_name, negative_price, zero_price_valid, zero_category, negative_category, very_small_negative_price, large_price, unicode_name, spaces_only, emoji_name, very_long_name, negative_category_large, all_fields_valid_with_description). TestUnitProductApplyDiscount (12 subtests: 0/1/10/33.33/50/99/100 percent, negative returns original, over 100 returns original, tiny 0.01, exactly -0.01, exactly 100.01). TestUnitProductApplyDiscountZeroPrice Рђћ 50% of 0 = 0. TestUnitProductApplyDiscountLargePrice Рђћ 25% of 1M = 750000. TestUnitProductValidatePriorityOrder Рђћ empty name checked before negative price. TestUnitProductValidateNameBeforeCategory Рђћ empty name before zero category. TestUnitProductValidatePriceBeforeCategory Рђћ negative price before zero category.

name: entity_order
content: Order entity: struct with ID(int64), CustomerID(string), Status(OrderStatus), Items([]OrderItem), Total(float64), CreatedAt/UpdatedAt(time.Time). OrderStatus constants: new, processing, completed, cancelled. OrderItem: ID, OrderID, ProductID(int64), Quantity(int), Price(float64). Methods: Validate() checks CustomerID!="" Рєњ ErrEmptyCustomerID, len(Items)>0 Рєњ ErrEmptyOrder, each item: Quantity>0 Рєњ ErrInvalidQuantity, ProductID>0 Рєњ ErrInvalidProduct. CalculateTotal() sums item.Price*item.Quantity, sets o.Total. CanCancel() returns true for new/processing. CanComplete() returns true only for processing. Tests: TestUnitOrderValidate (13 subtests: valid, empty_customer, empty_items, zero_quantity, negative_quantity, invalid_product, negative_product, nil_items, multiple_valid, second_item_invalid_quantity, second_item_invalid_product, large_quantity, unicode_customer). TestUnitOrderCalculateTotal Рђћ 3 items = 350*2+250*1+400*3. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalEmpty Рђћ 0. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalSingleItem Рђћ 500. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalLargeOrder Рђћ 50 items of 100*2 = 10000. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalFloatPrecision Рђћ 0.1*10+0.2*5 РЅѕ 2.0. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalSetsField Рђћ overwrites pre-existing Total. TestUnitOrderCanCancel Рђћ 4 statuses. TestUnitOrderCanComplete Рђћ 4 statuses. TestUnitOrderCanCancelUnknownStatus Рђћ false. TestUnitOrderCanCompleteUnknownStatus Рђћ false. TestUnitOrderValidatePriorityCustomerFirst Рђћ customer checked before items.

name: entity_news_category
content: NewsItem entity: ID, Title, Content, Author, PublishedAt, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt. Validate() checks Title!="" Рєњ ErrEmptyName, Content!="" Рєњ ErrEmptyContent. Summary(maxRunes int) truncates using []rune for UTF-8 correctness; if maxRunes<=3, no ellipsis. Tests: TestUnitNewsItemValidate (10 subtests: valid, empty_title, empty_content, both_empty, unicode, whitespace_valid, long_title, long_content, with_author, empty_author_valid). TestUnitNewsItemSummary (6 subtests: short_enough, truncated_20='лГЛѓлЙ л┤л╗лИлйлйЛІл╣ Лѓлхл║ЛЂЛѓ...', very_short_5='лГЛѓ...', tiny_3='лГЛѓлЙ', exact_length, one_less). TestUnitNewsItemSummaryEmptyContent Рђћ returns ''. TestUnitNewsItemSummaryOneChar Рђћ 'X'. TestUnitNewsItemSummaryMaxRunesZero Рђћ ''. TestUnitNewsItemSummaryMaxRunesOne Рђћ 'H'. TestUnitNewsItemSummaryMaxRunesTwo Рђћ 'He'. TestUnitNewsItemSummaryUnicode Рђћ 'лЪЛђлИл▓лхЛѓ л╝лИЛђ!' truncated to 6 = 'лЪЛђлИ...'. Category entity: ID, Name, Slug, Description, SortOrder, CreatedAt. Validate() checks Name!="" Рєњ ErrEmptyName, Slug!="" Рєњ ErrEmptySlug. Tests: TestUnitCategoryValidate (11 subtests: valid, empty_name, empty_slug, both_empty, with_description, with_sort_order, unicode_slug, slug_with_hyphens, long_name, whitespace_name_valid, whitespace_slug_valid).

name: repository_product
content: ProductRepository interface: Create, GetByID, List(categoryID, offset, limit), Update, Delete, Search(query, limit), Count(categoryID). SQLite implementation in sqlite/product.go. Integration tests: TestIntegrationProductCRUD Рђћ createРєњgetByIDРєњverify fieldsРєњupdate priceРєњverifyРєњdeleteРєњverify ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationProductList Рђћ create 5 products, List(all) = 5, List(byCat) = 5, List(paginated limit=2) = 2. TestIntegrationProductSearch Рђћ 3 products (лџл░л┐ЛЃЛЄлИлйлЙ/лЏл░ЛѓЛѓлх/лљл╝лхЛђлИл║л░лйлЙ), search 'л╝лЙл╗лЙл║' = 2 results (description match), search 'лџл░л┐ЛЃЛЄлИлйлЙ' = 1. TestIntegrationProductCount Рђћ initial=0, after 3 inserts=3, by category=3, non-existent category=0. TestIntegrationProductDeleteNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationProductGetByIDNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationProductUpdateNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationProductSearchNoResults Рђћ search 'лйлхЛЂЛЃЛЅлхЛЂЛѓл▓ЛЃЛјЛЅлИл╣' = 0. TestIntegrationProductSearchEmptyDB Рђћ 0. TestIntegrationProductListWithOffset Рђћ 10 products, page1(0,3)=3, page2(3,3)=3, last(9,3)=1, no overlap. TestIntegrationProductListByNonExistentCategory Рђћ cat 999 = 0. TestIntegrationProductSearchLimit Рђћ 10 matching products, limit=3 Рєњ 3. TestIntegrationProductUpdateFields Рђћ all fields changed and verified. TestIntegrationProductCountAfterDelete Рђћ 1РєњdeleteРєњ0.

name: repository_category
content: CategoryRepository interface: Create, GetByID, GetBySlug, List, Update, Delete. SQLite implementation in sqlite/category.go. List returns ordered by sort_order, name. Integration tests: TestIntegrationCategoryCRUD Рђћ full cycle createРєњgetРєњupdate name/slugРєњverifyРєњdeleteРєњErrNotFound. TestIntegrationCategoryGetBySlug Рђћ create then get by slug 'desserts'. TestIntegrationCategoryGetBySlugNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationCategoryGetByIDNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationCategoryList Рђћ 3 categories with sort_order 2,1,3 Рєњ first='coffee'. TestIntegrationCategoryListEmpty Рђћ 0 results. TestIntegrationCategoryUpdateNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationCategoryDeleteNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationCategoryCreateMultiple Рђћ 10 categories created, list returns 10. TestIntegrationCategoryUpdateSortOrder Рђћ change sort_order from 1 to 99 and verify.

name: repository_news
content: NewsRepository interface: Create, GetByID, List(offset, limit), Update, Delete, Count. SQLite implementation. Create auto-sets PublishedAt to now if zero, auto-sets CreatedAt/UpdatedAt. List ordered by published_at DESC. Integration tests: TestIntegrationNewsCRUD Рђћ full cycle with Author verification. TestIntegrationNewsGetByIDNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationNewsListPagination Рђћ 20 items, page(0,5)=5, page(5,5)=5, no overlap. TestIntegrationNewsListEmpty Рђћ 0. TestIntegrationNewsCount Рђћ initial=0, after 7 inserts=7. TestIntegrationNewsUpdateNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationNewsDeleteNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationNewsCreateWithPublishedAt Рђћ manual 2025-06-15 preserved. TestIntegrationNewsCreateAutoPublishedAt Рђћ auto-set to ~now. TestIntegrationNewsListOrderByPublishedDesc Рђћ 5 items with increasing PublishedAt, verify DESC order. TestIntegrationNewsCountAfterDelete Рђћ 1РєњdeleteРєњ0.

name: repository_order
content: OrderRepository interface: Create, GetByID, ListByCustomer(customerID, offset, limit), UpdateStatus, GetItems. SQLite implementation creates order + order_items in transaction. GetByID also loads items. Integration tests: TestIntegrationOrderCRUD Рђћ create with 1 item, verify customerID/items/quantity. TestIntegrationOrderStatusTransitions Рђћ newРєњprocessingРєњcompleted via UpdateStatus. TestIntegrationOrderListByCustomer Рђћ 3 orders for cust-A, 1 for cust-B, verify filtering. TestIntegrationOrderGetNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. Note: setupTestDB(t) in testhelper_test.go creates fresh :memory: SQLite with RunMigrations. seedCategory helper in product_test.go creates 'лблхЛЂЛѓлЙл▓л░ЛЈ' category.

name: usecase_product
content: ProductUseCase: wraps ProductRepository + CategoryRepository. Create validates product then checks category exists. List applies pagination defaults (page=1, pageSize=20). Update validates first. Delete delegates to repo. Search defaults limit to 20. Tests: TestUnitProductUCCreateValidatesCategory Рђћ non-existent category Рєњ ErrInvalidCategory. TestUnitProductUCCreateValidatesProduct Рђћ empty name Рєњ ErrEmptyName. TestUnitProductUCCreateValidatesNegativePrice Рђћ price<0 Рєњ ErrNegativePrice. TestUnitProductUCListPagination Рђћ 25 products, page 1 size 10 = 10 items + total=25, page 3 = 5 items. TestUnitProductUCListDefaultPageSize Рђћ page=0, size=0 Рєњ defaults to 20 items. TestUnitProductUCGetByID Рђћ retrieve and verify. TestUnitProductUCGetByIDNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestUnitProductUCUpdate Рђћ change name/price, verify. TestUnitProductUCUpdateValidation Рђћ empty name Рєњ ErrEmptyName. TestUnitProductUCDelete Рђћ delete then GetByID Рєњ ErrNotFound. TestUnitProductUCSearch Рђћ search 'лџл░л┐ЛЃЛЄлИлйлЙ' = 1. TestUnitProductUCSearchDefaultLimit Рђћ 25 matching, limit=0 Рєњ 20. TestUnitProductUCListByCategory Рђћ 2 coffee + 1 tea, verify per-category counts.

name: usecase_order
content: OrderUseCase: wraps OrderRepository + ProductRepository. Create: validates order, looks up product prices, sets item.Price from product, calls CalculateTotal(), sets status=new. Process: checks status=new Рєњ ErrInvalidStatus otherwise. Cancel: checks CanCancel() Рєњ ErrInvalidStatus. Complete: checks CanComplete() (only processing) Рєњ ErrInvalidStatus. ListByCustomer: defaults page=1, pageSize=20. Tests: TestUnitOrderUCCreateSetsPrice Рђћ product price=350, quantity=3, total=1050, status=new. TestUnitOrderUCCreateMultipleItems Рђћ 2 products, verify combined total. TestUnitOrderUCCreateInvalidProduct Рђћ product_id=999 Рєњ ErrInvalidProduct. TestUnitOrderUCCreateEmptyCustomer Рђћ ErrEmptyCustomerID. TestUnitOrderUCCreateEmptyItems Рђћ ErrEmptyOrder. TestUnitOrderUCGetByID Рђћ verify customer_id. TestUnitOrderUCGetByIDNotFound Рђћ ErrNotFound. TestUnitOrderUCListByCustomer Рђћ 5 for alice, 1 for bob. TestUnitOrderUCListByCustomerPagination Рђћ 10 orders, page1(3)=3, page2(3)=3. TestUnitOrderUCCancelFlow Рђћ cancel newРєњok, cancel cancelledРєњErrInvalidStatus. TestUnitOrderUCCancelProcessing Рђћ process then cancel Рєњ ok. TestUnitOrderUCCancelCompleted Рђћ complete then cancel Рєњ ErrInvalidStatus. TestUnitOrderUCCompleteRequiresProcessing Рђћ complete new Рєњ ErrInvalidStatus, process then complete Рєњ ok. TestUnitOrderUCProcessRequiresNew Рђћ process twice Рєњ ErrInvalidStatus. TestUnitOrderUCFullLifecycle Рђћ newРєњprocessРєњcomplete, verify status at each step. TestUnitOrderUCCancelNotFound/ProcessNotFound/CompleteNotFound Рђћ all ErrNotFound.

name: usecase_news_category
content: NewsUseCase: wraps NewsRepository. Create validates. List defaults page=1, pageSize=10. Update validates. Delete delegates. CategoryUseCase: wraps CategoryRepository. Create/Update validate. GetBySlug/List/Delete delegate. Tests: TestUnitNewsUCCreate Рђћ verify ID set. TestUnitNewsUCCreateValidationEmptyTitle/EmptyContent Рђћ ErrEmptyName/ErrEmptyContent. TestUnitNewsUCGetByID/GetByIDNotFound. TestUnitNewsUCUpdate Рђћ change title, verify. TestUnitNewsUCUpdateValidation Рђћ empty title Рєњ ErrEmptyName. TestUnitNewsUCDelete Рђћ delete then get Рєњ ErrNotFound. TestUnitNewsUCPagination Рђћ 15 items, page(1,5)=5, total=15. TestUnitNewsUCPaginationDefaults Рђћ page=0,size=0 Рєњ 10 items. TestUnitCategoryUCCreate Рђћ verify ID. TestUnitCategoryUCCreateValidationEmptyName/EmptySlug. TestUnitCategoryUCGetByID/GetBySlug/GetBySlugNotFound. TestUnitCategoryUCList Рђћ 2 categories. TestUnitCategoryUCUpdate Рђћ change name/slug. TestUnitCategoryUCUpdateValidation Рђћ empty name Рєњ ErrEmptyName. TestUnitCategoryUCDelete Рєњ ErrNotFound after.

name: api_product_tests
content: Product API tests (16 tests): TestAPIProductCRUD Рђћ create categoryРєњcreate product(лЏл░ЛѓЛѓлх,350)Рєњlist products=1. TestAPIProductValidationError Рђћ empty name=400, negative price=400. TestAPIProductGetByID Рђћ create and retrieve by ID. TestAPIProductNotFound Рђћ GET /products/99999 = 404. TestAPIProductUpdate Рђћ PUT /products/{id} changes name/price. TestAPIProductUpdateValidationError Рђћ PUT empty name = 400. TestAPIProductDelete Рђћ DELETE then GET = 404. TestAPIProductDeleteNotFound Рђћ DELETE /products/999 = 404. TestAPIProductSearch Рђћ search 'лџл░л┐ЛЃЛЄлИлйлЙ' = 1 result. TestAPIProductSearchEmpty Рђћ q='' returns empty array. TestAPIProductSearchNoResults Рђћ 'лйлхЛЂЛЃЛЅлхЛЂЛѓл▓ЛЃЛјЛЅлИл╣' = 0 (nil safe). TestAPIProductListPagination Рђћ 15 products, page_size=5 Рєњ 5 items + total=15. TestAPIProductListByCategory Рђћ 2 coffee + 1 tea, filter by category_id. TestAPIProductInvalidJSON Рђћ 'bad' body = 400. TestAPIProductInvalidID Рђћ /products/abc = 400. TestAPIProductSearchWithLimit Рђћ 10 matching, limit=3 Рєњ 3.

name: api_category_tests
content: Category API tests (10 tests): TestAPICategoryCRUD Рђћ POST creates, GET lists=1. TestAPICategoryGetByID Рђћ retrieve created category by ID. TestAPICategoryGetByIDNotFound Рђћ GET /categories/999 = 404. TestAPICategoryUpdate Рђћ PUT changes name/slug. TestAPICategoryDelete Рђћ DELETE then GET = 404. TestAPICategoryValidationEmptyName Рђћ POST empty name = 400. TestAPICategoryValidationEmptySlug Рђћ POST empty slug = 400. TestAPICategoryDeleteNotFound Рђћ 404. TestAPICategoryUpdateNotFound Рђћ 404. TestAPICategoryInvalidJSON Рђћ 'bad' = 400.

name: api_news_tests
content: News API tests (12 tests): TestAPINewsCRUD Рђћ POST creates, GET lists=1. TestAPINewsGetByID Рђћ retrieve by ID. TestAPINewsGetByIDNotFound Рђћ 404. TestAPINewsUpdate Рђћ PUT changes title/content. TestAPINewsUpdateValidation Рђћ empty title = 400. TestAPINewsDelete Рђћ DELETE then GET = 404. TestAPINewsDeleteNotFound Рђћ 404. TestAPINewsValidationEmptyTitle Рђћ POST empty title = 400. TestAPINewsValidationEmptyContent Рђћ POST empty content = 400. TestAPINewsInvalidJSON Рђћ 'bad' = 400. TestAPINewsListPagination Рђћ 12 items, page_size=5 Рєњ 5 + total=12.

name: api_order_tests
content: Order API tests (19 tests): TestAPIOrderFlow Рђћ full flow: create categoryРєњproduct(320)Рєњorder(qty=2)Рєњverify total=640, status=new. TestAPIOrderEmptyItems Рђћ empty items = 400. TestAPIOrderGetByID Рђћ create then GET. TestAPIOrderGetByIDNotFound Рђћ 404. TestAPIOrderProcess Рђћ POST /orders/{id}/process = 200. TestAPIOrderComplete Рђћ process then complete = 200. TestAPIOrderCancel Рђћ POST /orders/{id}/cancel = 200. TestAPIOrderCancelAlreadyCancelled Рђћ cancel twice = 400. TestAPIOrderCompleteWithoutProcess Рђћ complete new = 400. TestAPIOrderListByCustomer Рђћ 3 for alice, 1 for bob. TestAPIOrderEmptyCustomerID Рђћ empty customer = 400. TestAPIOrderInvalidJSON Рђћ 'bad' = 400. TestAPIOrderMultipleItems Рђћ лЏл░ЛѓЛѓлх(350)*2 + лал░Лё(400)*1 = 1100. TestAPIOrderProcessNotFound/CancelNotFound/CompleteNotFound Рђћ all 404. TestAPIOrderFullLifecycleViaAPI Рђћ createРєњprocessРєњcomplete, verify final status=completed. TestAPIOrderInvalidProduct Рђћ product_id=99999 = 400.

name: api_helpers_and_infrastructure
content: TestAPIResponseContentType Рђћ verifies Content-Type: application/json on list endpoints. TestAPIErrorResponseFormat Рђћ verifies error responses have {'error': '...'} structure. Helper functions: setupTestServer(t) creates httptest.Server with full handler stack (all 4 handlers + chi router), postJSON(url, body) marshals and posts, putJSON for PUT, doDelete for DELETE, decodeBody reads response JSON, createCategory/createProduct convenience helpers. All tests isolated via fresh in-memory SQLite. writeError() maps entity errors to HTTP status codes: ErrNotFoundРєњ404, validation errorsРєњ400, ErrAlreadyExistsРєњ409.

name: test_infrastructure
content: Test infrastructure pattern: setupTestDB(t) in testhelper_test.go opens :memory: SQLite, runs RunMigrations, registers db.Close() as t.Cleanup. seedCategory(t, repo) creates default 'лблхЛЂЛѓлЙл▓л░ЛЈ/test-cat' category. setupTestServer(t) creates full server stack: 4 repos + 4 usecases + 4 handlers + chi router Рєњ httptest.NewServer. setupUC(t) returns all 4 use cases with shared in-memory DB. seedCatAndProduct(t, productUC, categoryUC) creates default 'лџлЙЛёлх/coffee' category and 'лЏл░ЛѓЛѓлх' product (price=350). All test functions start with fresh database Рђћ no test pollution.

name: test_patterns_and_coverage
content: Coverage by layer: Entity layer Рђћ 28 test functions (7 Product, 12 Order, 9 News/Category) covering validation rules, business logic, edge cases (float precision, unicode, nil slices, unknown statuses, validation priority order). Repository layer Рђћ 39 test functions (14 Product, 10 Category, 11 News, 4 Order) covering CRUD, pagination, search, not-found errors, count after delete, empty DB, sort ordering. Usecase layer Рђћ 51 test functions (13 Product, 19 Order, 10 News, 9 Category) covering business validation chains, status machine transitions, full lifecycle, pagination defaults, not-found propagation. API layer Рђћ 57 test functions (16 Product, 10 Category, 12 News, 19 Order) covering all REST endpoints, error codes, invalid JSON, invalid IDs, content-type, error format. Table-driven tests with t.Run() used extensively in entity layer for parametric coverage.

name: known_issues_and_flaky_analysis
content: TestIntegrationProductSearch is potentially flaky: uses LIKE queries with Cyrillic text, behavior may vary across SQLite versions; depends on insert order. TestUnitNewsItemSummary was previously buggy Рђћ used len() instead of []rune for UTF-8 string truncation, now fixed. TestAPIProductSearchNoResults required nil-safe type assertion Рђћ products key can be null JSON array when Search returns nil slice, fixed with comma-ok assertion. The Go/SQLite search uses case-insensitive LIKE which works for ASCII but may not work correctly for all Unicode characters. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalFloatPrecision uses tolerance check (┬▒0.1) because IEEE 754 float arithmetic for 0.1*10+0.2*5 is not exactly 2.0. TestUnitProductApplyDiscount for 33.33% uses tolerance (┬▒0.1) due to floating point.

name: error_handling_map
content: Error to HTTP status mapping in handler/helpers.go writeError(): ErrNotFoundРєњ404, ErrEmptyNameРєњ400, ErrEmptySlugРєњ400, ErrEmptyContentРєњ400, ErrNegativePriceРєњ400, ErrInvalidCategoryРєњ400, ErrInvalidProductРєњ400, ErrInvalidQuantityРєњ400, ErrEmptyCustomerIDРєњ400, ErrEmptyOrderРєњ400, ErrInvalidStatusРєњ400, ErrAlreadyExistsРєњ409, all other errorsРєњ500. This is tested indirectly through API tests that verify correct status codes for each error type. The entity/errors.go defines all 12 sentinel errors. Tests verify validation order: Validate() checks are sequential Рђћ first failing check determines the returned error.

name: order_state_machine
content: Order status transitions: newРєњprocessing (Process), processingРєњcompleted (Complete), newРєњcancelled (Cancel), processingРєњcancelled (Cancel). Invalid transitions return ErrInvalidStatus: completedРєњcancelled, cancelledРєњanything, newРєњcompleted (must process first), processingРєњprocessing (already processing). Tested at 3 layers: entity (CanCancel/CanComplete methods), usecase (Process/Cancel/Complete with GetByIDРєњcheckРєњUpdateStatus), API (POST /orders/{id}/process|complete|cancel returning 200 or 400). TestUnitOrderUCFullLifecycle and TestAPIOrderFullLifecycleViaAPI test the complete happy path: create(new)Рєњprocess(processing)Рєњcomplete(completed) with status verification at each step.
